vocabulary.name: Star Wars API Vocabulary
vocabulary.description: Domain terms used by the Star Wars REST API (swapi.info)

terms.definition: A Star Wars canonical film, identified by episode number and title, including metadata such as director, producer, release date, and hypermedia links to related resources
The sequential episode number of a Star Wars film within the Skywalker Saga (1-6 in the original SWAPI dataset)
The iconic scrolling text that appears at the beginning of each Star Wars film, providing narrative context
A sentient individual who appears in Star Wars canon, including heroes, villains, and supporting characters
The year of birth of a person in the Star Wars in-universe calendar, expressed in BBY (Before the Battle of Yavin) or ABY (After the Battle of Yavin)
Before the Battle of Yavin — the primary dating convention used in Star Wars, counting years before the pivotal battle in Episode IV
After the Battle of Yavin — the Star Wars dating convention for years following the Battle of Yavin in Episode IV
The planet of birth or primary origin for a person or species, referenced via hypermedia URL
A celestial body in the Star Wars universe that serves as a location for events, settlements, or origin of species and characters
The number of standard hours it takes for a planet to complete one full rotation on its axis (equivalent to one local day)
The number of standard days it takes for a planet to complete one full orbit around its local star (equivalent to one local year)
The percentage of a planet's surface covered by naturally occurring water or bodies of water
A type of sentient life form in the Star Wars universe, classified by biology, designation, and cultural characteristics
The biological classification of a species (e.g., mammal, reptile, insectoid, artificial)
The cognitive status of a species, typically 'sentient' or 'semi-sentient'
The typical lifespan of a member of a given species, expressed in standard years
A spacecraft capable of interstellar travel (including hyperspace), distinguished from atmospheric-only vehicles
The class rating of a starship's hyperdrive system; lower numbers indicate faster hyperspace travel (Class 0.5 is faster than Class 1.0)
Megalights per hour — the unit used to measure the sublight speed of a starship in normal space
The operational classification of a starship by role or size (e.g., Starfighter, Cruiser, Freighter, Deep Space Mobile Battlestation)
A non-starship conveyance used within planetary atmospheres or on the surface, such as speeders, walkers, or crawlers
The operational classification of a vehicle by type (e.g., wheeled, repulsorcraft, walker, airspeeder)
The purchase price of a starship or vehicle when new, denominated in Galactic Credits
The maximum payload in kilograms that a starship or vehicle can carry
The maximum duration that a starship or vehicle can sustain its crew with food and water without resupply
Individuals who have been recorded as having piloted a given starship or vehicle, referenced via hypermedia URLs
The minimum number of personnel required to operate a starship or vehicle
The number of additional non-crew individuals a starship or vehicle can accommodate
The standard currency of the Galactic Republic and later the Galactic Empire, used as the monetary unit across most Star Wars transactions
A fully-qualified URL returned by the API that links to a related resource, enabling traversal of the Star Wars data graph
